name: pulse-terminal
description: Live crypto macro + derivatives intelligence â€” overview, stablecoins, ETFs, perp futures, DEX volume, TVL, funding rates, open interest, and cross-source anomaly detection.
long_description: Exposes 10 read-only MCP tools that pull real-time crypto market and derivatives data so Claude can analyse fund flows + leverage without an API key on the model side. Sources: CoinGecko (overview), DefiLlama (stablecoins / DEX / TVL), Binance/Bybit/OKX public endpoints (funding, OI, futures), alternative.me (Fear & Greed), Farside (real spot ETF flows). Optional COINGLASS_API_KEY swaps Farside for Coinglass since-inception cumulatives.

tools.name: get_market_overview
tools.description: Total mcap, BTC/ETH dominance, F&G, DeFi TVL

tools.name: get_etf_flows
tools.description: BTC/ETH spot ETF daily flows + cumulative

tools.name: get_futures
tools.description: Binance perp OI, funding, L/S, price (BTC/ETH)

tools.name: get_iv_smile
tools.description: IV smile per expiry across all venues — spot skew abnormalities

tools.name: get_options_arbitrage
tools.description: Cross-venue options mispricings (bid > ask between exchanges)

tools.name: get_dual_assets_apr
tools.description: Bybit Dual Assets APR snapshots (SQLite, 5min cadence)

tools.name: get_best_dual_assets_hour
tools.description: Hourly APR analysis — when of day to enter Bybit Dual Assets

tools.name: get_dual_assets_daily_summary
tools.description: Daily aggregated APR summaries (avg/max/min + best/worst hour) per date × pair × target

tools.name: grade_signal
tools.description: Grade an anomaly finding from detect_anomalies — returns rubric + required output schema for confidence/reasoning/risk_flags

coinglass_api_key.title: Coinglass API key (optional)
coinglass_api_key.description: Optional. Replaces Farside ETF data with Coinglass since-inception cumulative. Leave blank â€” Farside (free) is fine.

pulse_hub_url.title: Pulse Hub URL
pulse_hub_url.description: Where the local hub HTTP cache lives. Default: http://127.0.0.1:8081 (local). For remote deploy via Tailscale: http://<tailscale-ip>:8081 (e.g. http://100.90.142.81:8081).
